star3_integrity.date_ordering_root_cause: String comparison: '-' (ASCII 45) < '/' (ASCII 47), so '2026-01-23' < '2026/01/28' as strings. Logical chronological order is correct.
integrity_notes: 19 gaps in draw sequence — expected, 3_STAR has non-daily schedule
Date format inconsistency is cosmetic, not a data error
Chronological order correct when dates are parsed as date objects

source_trace.conclusion: All pre-P104 backups show 3_STAR count=4115 max=115000024 and 4_STAR count=0. Ingestion occurred after P94 backup (2026-05-26 22:39:34). No raw source file found, no ingest_log entry for 3_STAR/4_STAR, no fetcher support. Date format difference (dash vs slash) and complete 4_STAR historical import suggest data came from an external tool or manual operation outside this Claude Code session. Ingestion path is OUT_OF_BAND.

governance_impact.p100_authorization_condition: Requires explicit user/CTO decision on DB acceptance (Options A/B/C below). P100 must not run in P104.
governance_impact.star4_backtest_condition: Requires P105/P106 provenance validation before any 4_STAR analysis

option_A.label: Accept current DB state after audit
option_A.condition: User/CTO accepts data integrity PASS_WITH_NOTES and acknowledges out-of-band ingestion
option_A.outcome: Mark DB as ACCEPTED; create DB-state PR with explicit authorization; proceed to P100 evaluation in next phase
option_A.risk: Source provenance permanently unknown; no raw data for re-ingestion if DB corrupts

option_B.label: Require raw source file for provenance
option_B.condition: User provides raw CSV/JSON/XLSX used for ingestion
option_B.outcome: Run source validation against DB rows; if passes, accept state with provenance confirmed; classification upgrades to P104_POST_INGESTION_DB_AUDIT_SOURCE_CONFIRMED_READY
option_B.risk: May block P100 if source cannot be recovered

option_C.label: Restore previous DB backup
option_C.condition: User decides out-of-band provenance is unacceptable and wants clean state
option_C.outcome: Restore bak_p94_pre_apply (3_STAR=4115, 4_STAR=0); P100 returns to HOLD_NO_ACTUAL_DRAW state
option_C.risk: Discards 63 new 3_STAR draws and 2922 4_STAR draws that passed integrity checks

option_D.label: Create controlled DB-state PR after acceptance
option_D.condition: After Option A or B resolution
option_D.outcome: Explicit PR documenting accepted DB state; no DB file staged; commit only audit artifacts

next_action_decision_matrix.recommended: Ask user to identify the ingestion source (external script, manual API call, tool run outside repo). If source identified, classify as SOURCE_CONFIRMED_READY (Option B). If user cannot identify source but accepts the data quality, proceed with Option A. Only use Option C if data quality is unacceptable.
